cookbook_cmd: omitted from standalone kernel task; use bench/workloads.json and docs/captured_kernel_api_shapes.json for RLCR
shape_capture_note: Captured 2026-07-08 on Verda B300 light-face-hides-fin-03-1 from a real Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-FP8 TP=1 SGLang production-path execution in temporary container sglang-qwen36 on a single B300 GPU. Used a model-local HF cache after snapshot download, speculative_algorithm=EAGLE with 3 steps/topk 1 per the cookbook command, quantization=fp8 as detected by SGLang, attention_backend=trtllm_mha, moe_runner_backend=flashinfer_trtllm, disabled FlashInfer autotune, disabled CUDA graph prefill/decode, cleared startup health records before capture, and marked four request windows covering long prefill, short decode, mid concurrency, and high concurrency. The legacy fp8_bmm task maps to captured TRTLLM MHA attention APIs because this Qwen3.6 route did not emit a standalone bmm Python API; the old bmm GPU work is fused inside the attention backend.
